gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps forward confidently, raising both hands open as if inviting everyone to learn together
the tutor points to their right hand, extending fingers to show five while encouraging students to join in
the tutor leans slightly forward, raising both arms wide to illustrate the number line starting at zero
the tutor moves their right hand to visually jump to number five on an imaginary line, reenacting the addition motion
the tutor holds up five fingers and then adds three more, counting rhythmically with both hands while engaging students
the tutor stands tall, smiling as they encourage everyone to count together, keeping hands extended to guide attentively
the tutor waves arms excitedly while celebrating the success of adding five and three, showing enthusiasm and positivity
the tutor points firmly to an imaginary number line, recalling how it helped add numbers and reinforcing the learning visually
